title: JENNIE Creates a Sculpture of Herself | Vanity Fair
description: "I'm like the friend in the group that keeps everything from falling out of place." JENNIE of BLACKPINK gets real and personal as she creates a sculpture of herself. From her favorite activities that help her focus to handling self-doubt, hear JENNIE break down all the things that make her who she is today. How would she define the 'Ruby' era of her life? What's something about herself that she learned to love? How would her friends define her? What would she want to do if she weren't a pop star
